channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Peacemaker season 3: everything we know about the DC Universe TV show's possible return
item.description: Peacemaker season 3 isn't on the cards, but this isn't the end of the line for its eccentric cast of characters.
item.dc:creator: Tom Power, TechRadar

item.title: Networking terms and definitions
item.description: To find a brief definition of the networking term you are looking for user your browser’s “Find” feature then follow links to a fuller explanation. AI data center AI data centers are designed, built, and optimized to meet the demands of workloads created by the rise of artificial intelligence.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Getting real about AI strategy and deployment
item.description: Federal experts share real-world lessons on deploying AI across aging infrastructure, slow funding cycles, and workforce gaps. The post Getting real about AI strategy and deployment first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Terry Gerton, Federal News Network

item.title: Tesla’s ‘Robotaxi’ service is no Waymo
item.description: Greetings, salutations, and my thanks—as always—for reading Fast Company’s Plugged In. Me: “Are you here just to monitor for safety?” Guy sitting in the driver’s seat of the Tesla Model Y I’m riding in: “I can’t specify.
item.dc:creator: Harry McCracken, Fast Company

item.title: AMD quietly launched a new product which could soon prove immensely useful for AI inference and beyond
item.description: New AMD Solarflare X4 Ethernet adapters combine proven trading performance with features which could benefit AI inference and edge workloads.
item.dc:creator: Wayne Williams, TechRadar

item.title: Google hit by tougher scrutiny from UK’s antitrust watchdog
item.description: Alphabet Inc.'s Google became the first company to be designated with so called strategic market status in the UK, exposing the US firm's online search and advertising business to a closer scrutiny by the country's antitrust watchdog.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: G+D y sus socios Nexi y Capgemini desarrollarán la solución “offline“ del euro digital
item.description: El Banco Central Europeo (BCE) ha adjudicado a la alianza empresarial liderada por Giesecke+Devrient junto al proveedor de servicios de pago Nexi y Capgemini el desarrollo de una solución integral que permita a usuarios y comercios de toda Europa realizar pagos con el euro digital en modo offline.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: AI first: The EU’s new AI strategy
item.description:
EU Commission President von der Leyen called for an AI-first mindset at the presentation of the Apply AI and AI in Science Strategy.
miss.cabul – Shutterstock.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: AI cameras race for a real-time edge
item.description: The latest AI imaging tools not only create a picture from a prompt (you type words, and the tool makes a picture seemingly ex nihilo). They also do another neat trick: You can upload a photograph, and they can convincingly modify it.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Why Wi-Fi calling may be killing your phone's battery life
item.description: iPhone and Android users can reduce Wi-Fi calling battery drainage through settings adjustments, background app limits and stronger Wi-Fi connections.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ferrari reveals features of first fully electric vehicle, but its financial outlook mars the debut
item.description: Italian luxury sports carmaker Ferrari raised its 2025 guidance in the face of global 15% tariffs on foreign car imports to the United States as the company unveiled the new powertrain and chassis of its first fully electric production vehicle.
item.dc:creator: Colleen Barry, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Accelerating AI success with Cloudera AMPs
item.description: AI is moving fast, but turning pilots into production takes more than excitement. It demands skilled teams, the right infrastructure, and significant time. Large enterprises can often throw resources at the challenge, but most businesses are looking for a smarter, faster path to measurable AI value.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Greenland's leader hails EU as trusted friend and urges investment in its minerals
item.description: BRUSSELS (AP) — Greenland’s leader on Wednesday thanked the European Union for being “a trusted friend” and urged the 27-nation bloc to invest in his country’s mineral resources, renewable energy, airports and internet services.
item.dc:creator: LORNE COOK, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: She helped North Korea infiltrate American tech companies
item.description: From her Arizona living room, Christina Chapman ran a covert hub that helped North Korean operatives infiltrate U.S. firms, netting $17 million in stolen salaries.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Nobel Prize in Physics awarded to quantum pioneers
item.description: In a boost to the profile of quantum computing, the Nobel Prize Committee has awarded this year’s Physics prize to three pioneers in the field of quantum research: John Clarke, Michel H. Devoret and John M.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Deloitte’s AI governance failure exposes critical gap in enterprise quality controls
item.description: A breakdown in AI governance at Deloitte Australia has forced the consulting giant to refund part of an AU$440,000 (US$290,000) government contract after AI-generated fabrications were included in a final report, exposing vulnerabilities that analysts said are symptomatic of broader challenges as en
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: PyCrucible: An easy way to redistribute your Python apps
item.description: One of Python’s most persistent limitations is how unnecessarily difficult it is to take a Python program and give it to another user as a self-contained click-to-run package. The design of the Python language makes this surprisingly difficult to do.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Growing number of people spending less time on social media
item.description: Around 50% of all teens and young adults surveyed said they have taken a break from social media in the past year.
item.dc:creator: Marcus Espinoza, NewsNation

item.title: ChatGPT to evolve into an AI operating system as OpenAI opens doors to third-party apps
item.description: OpenAI has launched apps inside ChatGPT, a new feature allowing users to discover and use third-party applications directly within the chat interface.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: AMD/OpenAI pact means new enterprise IT options
item.description: Monday’s announcement that OpenAI and AMD have struck a deal, albeit an unusual one without cash commitments, could mean that AMD chips may become a viable enterprise IT option.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Google's Play Store shake-up looms after Supreme Court refuses to delay overhaul of the monopoly
item.description: The U.S. Supreme Court on Monday refused to protect Google from a year-old order requiring a major makeover of its Android app store that's designed to unleash more competition against a system that a jury declared an illegal monopoly.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: OpenAI and chipmaker AMD sign chip supply partnership for AI infrastructure
item.description: Semiconductor maker AMD will supply its chips to artificial intelligence company OpenAI as part of an agreement to team up on building AI infrastructure, the companies said Monday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Nvidia and Fujitsu team for vertical industry AI projects
item.description: Nvidia has partnered with Japanese technology giant Fujitsu to work together on vertical industry-specific artificial intelligence projects.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: How a single MacBook compromise spread across a user’s Apple devices
item.description: Expert cybersecurity tips help Mac owners remove malware infections and strengthen defenses with antivirus software, password managers and system updates.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Nvidia: Latest news and insights
item.description: More processor coverage on Network World: Intel news and insights | AMD news and insights With its legacy of innovation in GPU technology, Nvidia has become a dominant force in the AI market. Nvidia’s partners read like a technology who’s who list – e.g.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: 7 SASE certifications to validate converged network and security skills
item.description: As cyberattacks grow more sophisticated and AI-powered threats escalate, enterprises are under pressure to evolve beyond traditional perimeter-based network security.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Cisco: Latest news and insights
item.description: Cisco (Nasdaq:CSCO) is the dominant vendor in enterprise networking, and under CEO Chuck Robbins, it continues to shake things up. Cisco is focusing on strategic AI initiatives and partnerships across various regions to build and power AI data centers and ecosystems.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Third of Americans romantically linked with AI, survey finds
item.description: Out of more than 1,000 U.S. adults, 28% were intimate or romantically linked to the system, according to the study.
item.dc:creator: Rob Taub, NewsNation

item.title: Protect yourself from sneaky web injection scams
item.description: Online banking users face a new threat: web injection scams that overlay fake pop-ups to steal logins. Here’s how to spot them and protect your accounts.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
